description_long: This object is a highly stylized hammer with a whimsical, anthropomorphic design. The head of the hammer is shaped like a large, multi-petaled flower, giving it a playful and decorative appearance. The handle and limbs are composed of thin, rod-like segments connected by spherical joints, with flat, leaf-shaped elements at the ends, resembling hands and feet. The central body is a simple sphere, from which the limbs extend, and the overall structure is lightweight and open, with significant negative space. The surface appears uniformly smooth and matte, with no visible texturing or color variation. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the object.
description: A whimsical hammer with a flower-shaped head and thin, jointed limbs ending in leaf-like shapes, all in a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: The flower-shaped hammer head is prominent, with one leaf-like limb raised and the other extended downward.
description_view_1: The front view shows the full face of the flower head and both leaf-shaped limbs clearly, with the central sphere and jointed rods visible.
description_view_2: The back of the flower head is visible, with the limbs and leaf shapes extending outward and the central sphere partially obscured.
description_view_3: The hammer is seen from above, highlighting the arrangement of the petals and the angular positioning of the limbs.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, thin plastic handle composed of rod-like segments with smooth, matte finish and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Flower-shaped head with multiple rounded petals, not resembling any traditional hammer head type such as claw or sledge.
